name: ahmed-fares-academy
description: Ahmed Fares English Academy - Premium Platform

scripts.build: cd client && npm install --legacy-peer-deps && npm run build
scripts.build:server: cd server && npm install --legacy-peer-deps && npm run build
scripts.build:all: npm run build:server && npm run build
scripts.install:all: cd server && npm install --legacy-peer-deps && cd ../client && npm install --legacy-peer-deps
scripts.db:setup: npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed
scripts.db:reset: npm run db:migrate:undo && npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && npm run db:setup && npm run build
